emails.subject: Re: apb fees
emails.body: Re: apb fees 517814 added .0075 fee per Chris Mallory 535228 I'm waiting for Tom's desk to settle down a bit they're in the middle of trading. Any idea why APB's just checking these deals out now? They're from the beginning of February. Just wondering. Thanks, Kate Kerri Thompson@ENRON 03/26/2001 01:08 PM
